'''Kulv-Bockar''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] company who produced [[Transport Bathysphere/Personnel|transport bathyspheres]] capable of carrying passengers under the [[Dac/Legends|Calamari]] oceans.<ref name="DITU" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Death in the Undercity]]'' {{Reprint|Death in the Undercity}} {{1st}}
